script:
set +e
echo '=== ts ==='; date -u +%FT%TZ
echo '=== all *-bot.service running ==='; systemctl list-units --type=service --no-pager --state=running --no-legend | grep -E '(bot|responder)\.service$' || true
echo '=== home recently-modified responders (last 14d) ==='; find /home/azureuser -maxdepth 1 -name '*-responder.py' -mtime -14 -printf '%T@ %p\n' 2>/dev/null | sort -rn | head -20
echo '=== bot display names from any manifest.json ==='; find /home/azureuser -maxdepth 3 -name 'manifest.json' 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo '=== grep all responders for display string Claude AI ==='; grep -l -i 'Claude AI' /home/azureuser/*-responder.py /home/azureuser/*-bot.py /home/azureuser/*-send-to.sh 2>/dev/null || true
echo '=== az bot list (display names) ==='; az bot list -g SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw --query "[].{name:name,display:properties.displayName}" -o tsv 2>/dev/null || true
echo '=== END ==='
